name: No Paint No Gain
short_description: They say that without pain, there is no gain... But in this game, if you don't paint you don't gain! Choose the color or material you want and decorate the train stations as you want. Before start painting you must clean the station to earn money and buy some materials... So don't pain
detailed_description:
In No Paint No Gain you must restore abandoned stations and decorate them to your liking for them you will have tools to do every single thing.



TOOLS

A brush to paint the walls.

A hammer to fix all the things they have broken.

A sponge to clean all the graffiti off the walls.

A scanner to sell objects.

A spray to paint graffiti.

TABLET

On the Tablet you will be able to choose and buy new paints for your walls and floors.

DECORATION

You will also be able to decorate the train stations with new objects.

PHOTO MODE

You will be able to take pictures of your restored stations

supported_languages: English, French, Spanish - Spain, Catalan, Portuguese - Brazil
